title: Infinite loop when generate for condition is >= 0
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

`./yosys backfor.v`

```
module top(output [3:0] o);
generate
    genvar i;
    for (i = 3; i >= 0; i = i-1) begin
        assign o[i] = 1'b0;
    end
endgenerate
endmodule
```

## Expected behavior

No infinite loop.

## Actual behavior

Infinite loop.
Works if condition is `i > 0` (losing one iteration obviously).
